title: Exosphere Worldgen Refabricated
description: Exosphere Worldgen for Fabric and new versions of the game.
body:
Exosphere Worldgen Refabricated is a unofficial fork of the [Exosphere Worldgen Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/exosphere-worldgen), which was created as an evolution of [Stratospherical Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/stratospherical-expansion).

However, it does have some minor differences in generation. Furthermore, the mod should be fully compatible with most mods for new biomes, as it uses tags. For example, **Biomes O' Plenty** or **Oh The Biomes We've Gone work**, but **Terralith** or **Tectonic do not**.

**Paraglider and grappling hook mods are recommended for easy movement!**

This is a fully server-side mod and doesn't do anything client-side.

If you find a bug or have suggestions, open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/yori3o/Exosphere-Worldgen-Refabricated/issues).
